use_for: Simple common spell, direct damage reference. The benchmark for efficient red burn.
Basic mana dork creature. Shows tap ability formatting and Creature type line with race/class.
White removal Aura. Demonstrates 'Enchant creature' template and white's non-destructive removal.
Clean unconditional creature removal. Shows double-colored mana cost for color commitment.
Baseline counterspell at common. Pair with Counterspell to show rarity/power differences.
Green ramp sorcery. Library search template and land-onto-battlefield wording.
Common enchantment with ETB and sacrifice abilities. Red card filtering (rummage) example.
Premium white exile removal. Demonstrates drawback-based balancing (opponent gains life).
Efficient hard counter. Compare with Cancel to show how 1 mana difference changes power level.
Versatile permanent removal in green. Token creation as downside, 'any permanent' targeting.
Clean two-color design blending red damage + white lifegain. Multicolor card template.
Artifact creature with multiple keywords and ETB. Shows dual-type card and keyword list formatting.
Scry land (uncommon dual). Demonstrates land card patterns: null mana_cost, ETB tapped, tap for mana.
Build-around rare creature with token generation trigger. Shows rare-level complexity.
3-mana planeswalker with static + loyalty abilities. Planeswalker formatting reference.

card_name: Fable of the Mirror-Breaker // Reflection of Kiki-Jiki
use_for: Transform Saga card. Shows double-faced card structure, Saga chapter formatting, card_faces array.
Rare instant with library manipulation. Shows 'look at top N' template and creature deployment.
Fetch land variant. Sacrifice cost, library search, conditional untap. Complex land design.
Check land (conditional dual). 'Enters tapped unless' template. Rare vs uncommon land comparison.
Flash planeswalker. Unusual keyword on planeswalker type, multiple loyalty ability options.
Mythic legendary creature with symmetry-breaking triggers. Keyword + multiple triggered abilities.
4-color mythic legendary. Landfall ability word, escalating triggers, extreme color requirements.
4-color mythic with stacked keywords. Multiple keywords on one line, massive ETB, 7-mana top-end.
2-mana mythic planeswalker. Emblem creation template, efficient planeswalker design.
Legendary artifact with counter-based mechanics. Colorless design, escalating cost/benefit, 'if you cast it' clause.
